coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Gain +10 [Charge] Count
[OnSucceedAttackHead] Give [Charge] Count to all allies by Envy Reson.

[OnSucceedAttack] Gain +10 [Charge] Count
[EndSkill] Give [Charge] Count to all allies by Envy Reson.

[OnSucceedAttack] Gain +10 [Charge] Count and 10 [Burst]
[OnSucceedAttackHead] Give +10 [Charge] Count, 5 [Vulnerable], and 10 [Burst] to all allies

[OnSucceedAttack] Gain +10 [Charge] Count and 10 [Burst]
[EndSkill] Give 5 [Vulnerable], 10 [Burst], and +12 [Charge] Count to all allies

2030311.name: Haphazard Discharge
2030311.desc: At the start of the combat phase, a random ally with [Charge] gains +(Envy A-Reson. / 2) [Charge] Count.
